placement_observations.size_descriptor: reduced statistic tensor [B, 1, C] (output of keepdim mean/sum reduction, small)
placement_observations.source: call_site: attentive-stats pooling; surrounding subtract/concat ops explicitly use ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG, sqrt consumes/produces L1-resident reduced stats

placement_observations.size_descriptor: L2-norm accumulator [..., 1] reduced over large last dim, parent tensor chunked at 65536
placement_observations.source: call_site: _l2_normalize_sparse_ttnn moves parent tensor to ttnn.DRAM_MEMORY_CONFIG and chunks last dim at CHUNK=65536 before pow/sum/sqrt

placement_observations.size_descriptor: std tensor [B, 1, C], immediately consumed by repeat/concat in L1
placement_observations.source: call_site: std = ttnn.sqrt(ttnn.clamp(...)); downstream ttnn.concat([...], memory_config=ttnn.L1_MEMORY_CONFIG)
